title: Earning free items for student-free plan
excerpt:
I am using the student-free plan. I invited some of my friends according to the guidance on the website. They already created the accounts and confirmed. However, I didn’t receive any free items. 
Does anyone know how to…

posts.author: vanthinh1711 (Truong Van Thinh)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am using the student-free plan. I invited some of my friends according to the guidance on the website. They already created the accounts and confirmed. However, I didn’t receive any free items.
Does anyone know how to fix this problem?

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @vanthinh1711, sorry to hear you haven’t received the free items yet! Can you write to support@monday.com about this? Then we can offer you quicker and more personalized support on this.

posts.author: vanthinh1711 (Truong Van Thinh)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you for your suggestion. I contacted Monday’s support team. They gave me free items. However, the issue related to my account has not solved yet. I still have to send emails to ask about the free items. The system does not automatically add the free items to my account.
